site.title: Basant Paudel — Network Engineer
site.description: Basant Paudel — Network Engineer. Routing & switching, backend development, and cybersecurity. Portfolio and contact.

person.name: Basant Paudel
person.headline: Network Engineer
person.about: Skilled Network Engineer with experience in configuring, maintaining, and troubleshooting LAN/WAN networks. Detail-oriented Network Engineer with strong knowledge of routing, switching, and network security.

roles.title: Cybersecurity
roles.summary: Threat detection, log analysis, incident response

jobs.description: Built and deployed a Django-based portfolio website with dynamic admin-controlled content, secure media handling, and scalable backend architecture. Applied Python best practices and vibe coding methodology to deliver a clean, efficient, and production-ready web application.
Focus on LAN/WAN design and operations, routing and switching, and securing enterprise-style networks. Combines formal training with hands-on lab practice.
Network security, Linux hardening, threat detection, log analysis, incident response, vulnerability assessment, and hands-on home lab practice using Google Cybersecurity training.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Ready to discuss your next project? Let's connect.
